title: Aggressive AI Wall Street
objective: Find a concentrated AI and technology leadership sleeve that compounds faster than broad large-cap market exposure without faking robustness.
summary: Aggressive concentrated-tech research lane. Current leader exists, but nothing in this campaign is close enough to quality-gated promotion yet.
last_meaningful_change: Dynamic Top 6 became the current aggressive leader after the first focused AI/tech screen batch.
promotion_target: Clear bench quality gates and earn paper eligibility without relying on one hot AI tape.

runner_up_gap.summary: Leader and runner-up are still clustered in exploratory territory; neither has earned promotion pressure yet.

family_groups.title: Dynamic Tech Screens
family_groups.summary: Month-frozen or screen-driven universes that keep the candidate set concentrated in current AI and software leadership.

family_groups.title: Regime-Gated Momentum
family_groups.summary: The underlying implementation family currently executing these aggressive screens.

candidates.title: Dynamic Top 6

latest_run.summary: Current aggressive leader. Still failed quality gates across the era sweep, so this is a bench leader, not a promotion candidate yet.

notes: This is the sharpest expression of the aggressive AI thesis currently checked in.
Leader status here does not imply promotion readiness.

candidates.title: Dynamic Top 8

latest_run.summary: Broader aggressive challenger using the same frozen stop/target structure on a wider top-8 AI/tech screen.

notes: Useful as the immediate breadth check against the top-6 concentration bet.

candidates.title: Dynamic Tech Screen

latest_run.summary: Dynamic aggressive screen using the same regime-aware momentum engine with a broader rotating tech leadership universe.

notes: Keeps the campaign from over-anchoring on one specific top-N concentration choice.

change_log.title: Dynamic Top 6 took the lead
change_log.detail: The first aggressive AI/tech batch gave Dynamic Top 6 the internal lead, but the campaign remains exploratory because the era results still fail quality gates.

change_log.title: Campaign manifest checked in
change_log.detail: Bench Campaigns now model this thesis as a first-class research program instead of leaving the candidates as disconnected passports.
